title: oxalis capillacea
intro: Oxalis capillacea, also known as the Cape sorrel or wild violet, is a perennial herb belonging to the Oxalis genus. It is native to South Africa and has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Oxalis capillacea include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Oxalis capillacea can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
